summary: Update README with project details and development setup
description: Update README.md with: game description (Geometry Dash-style synthwave platformer), device file structure (/Games/GeoDash/), development setup (Thonny + USB-C), controls mapping, how to deploy to device, link to DEV_GUIDE.md. Keep existing specs and resources sections.

summary: Create DEV_GUIDE.md with API reference and development patterns
description: Create DEV_GUIDE.md covering: engine API quick reference (engine_main, engine, engine_draw, engine_io, engine_nodes, engine_resources, engine_audio, engine_save, engine_math, engine_physics), coordinate system (camera at origin, -64 to +64, Y-up), node patterns (Rectangle2DNode, Text2DNode, CameraNode properties), game loop pattern (while True / engine.tick()), input handling (is_pressed, is_just_pressed), color constants table, font/text rendering with FontResource + Text2DNode, save data usage, deployment workflow via Thonny.

summary: Create manifest.ini and launcher integration files
description: Create manifest.ini with name=GeoDash, main=main.py, icon=icon.bmp. Create a simple geometric icon.bmp (38px tall) for the launcher tile - can be a simple colored square/triangle on black background representing the game. This ensures the game appears properly in the Thumby Color game launcher.

summary: Scaffold main.py with imports, constants, and game loop skeleton
description: Create main.py with all imports (engine_main, engine, engine_draw, engine_io, engine_math, engine_nodes, engine_resources, engine_audio, engine_save, random, math). Define constants for physics (gravity, jump velocity, ground Y, player X), synthwave colors, speeds, screen bounds. Set up CameraNode, engine.fps_limit(60), load font via FontResource, and the while True / engine.tick() game loop with state machine dispatch (STATE_MENU, STATE_PLAYING, STATE_DEAD, STATE_RETRY).

summary: Implement player cube with jump mechanics
description: Create the player as a Rectangle2DNode (cyan, 10x10) at fixed X=-30. Implement manual jump physics: velocity_y, gravity, ground detection at GROUND_Y. A button (is_just_pressed) triggers jump when on ground. Rotation: spin while airborne, snap to nearest 90deg on landing. Manual position updates each frame (no physics engine).

summary: Build scrolling ground system
description: Create 12 Rectangle2DNode ground segments (~24px wide each) tiled across the screen at Y=-55, purple fill. Add a magenta ground surface line at Y=-45. Segments scroll left each frame at scroll_speed. When a segment exits screen left, recycle it to the right edge. Ground scrolling controlled by a global scroll_speed variable.

summary: Add obstacle pool with spikes and blocks
description: Pre-allocate 6 Rectangle2DNode obstacles. Two types: spikes (8x8, rotated 45deg, pink) and blocks (10x variable height, violet). Timer-based spawning: when timer expires, pick an inactive obstacle from pool, configure type randomly, position at X=80. Obstacles scroll left with ground. When off-screen left, deactivate by moving to X=200. Difficulty: spawn interval decreases and scroll_speed increases with score.

summary: Implement collision detection and death
description: Each frame during STATE_PLAYING, run AABB collision check between player and all active obstacles. Shrink spike hitboxes to 70% for fairness. Also check if player falls below death Y threshold (pit death). On collision: transition to STATE_DEAD, trigger death effects.

summary: Add pit gaps in ground segments
description: When recycling ground segments to the right, randomly make some segments into gaps (opacity=0, flagged as gap). Player falls through gaps. Pit frequency increases with difficulty/score. Ensure gaps don't spawn too close together (minimum 2 solid segments between gaps).

summary: Add HUD with Text2DNode for score and prompts
description: Use FontResource + Text2DNode (layer 7) for all HUD text. Display current score top-center in magenta during gameplay. Show game title on menu screen. Show 'PRESS A' prompts on menu and retry screens. Show score + high score on retry screen. Bundle a font .bmp file with the game (e.g. outrunner_outline.bmp from engine examples).

summary: Implement score tracking and high score persistence
description: Increment score each frame during STATE_PLAYING. Display score // 6 for ~10pts/sec at 60fps. On death, compare with high score loaded from engine_save.load('hi', 0). If new high, save with engine_save.save('hi', score). Show both scores on retry screen.

summary: Add menu and retry game states
description: STATE_MENU: show game title via Text2DNode, pulsing player cube animation, 'PRESS A' prompt. Transition to STATE_PLAYING on A press. STATE_DEAD: flash screen magenta for 5 frames, trigger engine_io.rumble(), pause 1 second, transition to STATE_RETRY. STATE_RETRY: show score + high score, 'PRESS A' to restart. Reset all game objects on restart.

summary: Add synthwave visual effects and parallax background
description: Sunset gradient sky (6 color bands), sun with halo that descends during gameplay, neon magenta grid lines with perspective spacing, twinkling star field (12 cyan dots, 20% parallax), neon light streak particles (cyan/pink/magenta, 50% parallax), horizon glow line. Replaced original minimal dark purple particles.

summary: Add sound effects (jump and death)
description: Create ToneSoundResource for jump (~800Hz) and death (~200Hz). Play jump sound on channel 0 when player jumps. Play death sound on channel 1 on collision. Placeholder for future synthwave background music on channels 2-3.

summary: Scale all game objects 2x
description: Double the size of player (10->20), ground segments (24x20->48x40), obstacles (spikes 8->16, blocks 10->20 wide, heights doubled), particles (2->4), collision hitboxes, title text scale (2->4). Also scale physics (gravity 0.35->0.70, jump vel -5->-10) and scroll speeds (1.5/3.5->3.0/7.0) to maintain gameplay feel.

summary: Update README with mpremote deployment instructions
description: Replace Thonny-only deploy instructions with mpremote commands as the primary deployment method, keeping Thonny as an alternative.

summary: Add looping background music during gameplay
description: Convert MP3 to mono 16-bit 22050Hz WAV, load via WaveSoundResource, loop on channel 2 during gameplay, stop on death. Lazy-load to avoid startup issues.

summary: Improve gameplay fairness and difficulty curve
description: Enforce minimum obstacle spacing (no spawns if active obstacle past x=20), prevent obstacles near pit gaps, slow difficulty ramp (speed 0.002/pt, spawn floor 60 frames).

summary: Add setting sun animation during gameplay
description: Sun starts at y=-50 and slowly descends toward the horizon as score increases, reaching ground line around score 600. Resets on game restart.

summary: Increase base scroll speed
description: Bump BASE_SCROLL from 3.0 to 4.5 for snappier gameplay feel from the start.

summary: Fix title text size and add legible HUD font
description: Reduce title text scale from 4x back to 2x. Switch score, PRESS A, and high score text from outrunner_outline font to system font5x7 at 2x scale for better legibility.

summary: Return to launcher on MENU button press
description: Break out of game loop when engine_io.MENU.is_just_pressed, which returns control to the system boot script and shows the launcher.

summary: Step-based speed increases every 100 points
description: Instead of continuous gradual speed ramp, increase scroll speed in discrete steps every 100 points for a more noticeable and satisfying difficulty curve.

summary: Show title on retry screen
description: Display GEODASH title text at the top of the screen on the retry/game over screen.

summary: Update prompt text per screen
description: Title screen shows 'Press A' and 'To Start', retry screen shows 'Try Again?'.

summary: Prevent obstacles spawning too close after pit gaps
description: After a pit gap, suppress obstacle spawning for 45 frames to give the player time to land and jump again. Also widened gap detection zone. Prevents unfair wall-after-hole scenarios.

summary: Polish title screen: subtle player cube and text spacing
description: Player cube starts invisible and pulses subtly (0-30% opacity) on title screen to avoid obscuring text. Added spacing between 'Press A' and 'To Start' lines. Removed high score from title screen.

summary: Bug: player survives falling into pit gaps
description: Player falls into a hole but sometimes comes back up and keeps going instead of dying. Fixed: falling_in_pit flag set when player is below ground level and moving downward over a gap, preventing ground collision from catching them.

summary: Reduce player cube opacity on retry screen
description: Fade out the player cube on the retry screen so it doesn't distract from the score and prompt text.

summary: Death particle explosion effect
description: On death, 20 particles burst in 3 layers (fast/small, medium, slow/large) in cyan/pink/magenta, fading out over 30 frames. Player cube hidden immediately.

summary: Move score up on retry screen
description: Nudge the final score text higher on the retry screen.

summary: Bug: rotation doesn't complete full 360 degrees
description: Rounding error from continuous rotation addition causes the block to not quite complete a full rotation. Fixed: reset rotation to 0 on landing instead of snapping to nearest 90.
